_comment: VastAI instance template for ComfyUI provisioning. The onstart_cmd invokes the image's normal boot pipeline (entrypoint.sh → boot_default.sh → /etc/vast_boot.d/*), which handles workspace sync, supervisord launch, then runs PROVISIONING_SCRIPT as Phase 9 of its declarative provisioner, then removes /.provisioning so services start. Replace the REPLACE_ME values before use.
_volume_setup_optional: If you want models + workflow edits + UI settings to persist across instance destroy/recreate, find a machine_id that has BOTH a rentable GPU AND a co-located volume offer (run the helper from README's 'Optional persistent volume' section), create the volume via `vastai create volume <offer-id> --size 200 --name workday_test`, then set VOLUME_ID below and include the link-volume + mount-path keys on instance create. Without a volume the framework runs fine but models redownload on every cold boot.
_usage:
# Optional: create a volume if a co-located offer is available (see README)
vastai create volume <volume-offer-id> --size 200 --name workday_test
# -> note returned numeric id

# Launch the instance.
# WITH volume:    --link-volume <id> --mount-path /workspace/ComfyUI/models  + -e VOLUME_ID=<id>
# WITHOUT volume: omit the --link-volume / --mount-path / -e VOLUME_ID lines
vastai create instance <offer-id> --image vastai/comfy:v0.22.0-cuda-12.9-py312 --disk 100 --link-volume <volume-id> --mount-path /workspace/ComfyUI/models --env "-p 1111:1111 -p 8080:8080 -p 8188:8188 -p 8288:8288 -p 8384:8384 -p 18188:18188 -e PROVISIONING_SCRIPT=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ismail-kattakath/comfyui-provisioner/main/providers/vastai/onstart.sh -e HF_TOKEN=hf_... -e STACK_REPO=owner/your-stack -e VOLUME_ID=<volume-id> -e PORTAL_CONFIG='localhost:1111:11111:/:Instance Portal|localhost:8188:18188:/:ComfyUI|localhost:8288:18288:/docs:API Wrapper|localhost:8080:18080:/:Jupyter|localhost:8080:8080:/terminals/1:Jupyter Terminal|localhost:8384:18384:/:Syncthing' -e COMFYUI_ARGS='--disable-auto-launch --port 18188 --enable-cors-header --enable-manager' -e OPEN_BUTTON_PORT=1111 -e OPEN_BUTTON_TOKEN=1" --onstart-cmd '/opt/instance-tools/bin/entrypoint.sh' --ssh --direct
